frontmatter.title: Test All Components
frontmatter.description: A test page to visualize all MDX components available in the blog.
frontmatter.ogDescription: A test page to visualize all MDX components available in the blog.

Heading 1: Main Title

Heading 2: Subtitle

Heading 3: Section Title

This is a paragraph demonstrating bold text, italic text, and a link. It shows how a standard paragraph looks in the blog post body.

This is a blockquote. It stands out from the rest of the text and is useful for highlighting quotes or important snippets of information.

function sayHello(name: string) {
  console.log(`Hello, ${name}!`);
}
sayHello("World");

Table

Feature Description Status
Callout Highlighted box Active
YouTube Video embed Active

Custom Components

Info Callout

This is an **info** callout box to highlight some information to the user.

Warning Callout

This is a **warning** callout box. Be careful about missing this!

YouTube Embed

FAQ Component

Frequently Asked Questions

What is this page?
This is a test page containing all available components to see how they look.
Why are we testing components?
To ensure that the styling for each component looks good and consistent before actually writing real content using them.
rawContent:
# Heading 1: Main Title

## Heading 2: Subtitle

### Heading 3: Section Title

This is a paragraph demonstrating **bold text**, *italic text*, and [a link](https://example.com). It shows how a standard paragraph looks in the blog post body.

> This is a blockquote. It stands out from the rest of the text and is useful for highlighting quotes or important snippets of information.

### Lists

Here is an unordered list:
* Item 1
* Item 2
  * Nested item A
  * Nested item B
* Item 3

Here is an ordered list:
1. First step
2. Second step
3. Third step

### Code Block

```typescript
function sayHello(name: string) {
  console.log(`Hello, ${name}!`);
}
sayHello("World");
```

### Table

| Feature | Description | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Callout | Highlighted box | Active |
| YouTube | Video embed | Active |
| Custom | Other components | WIP |

### Custom Components

<Callout title="Info Callout" type="info">
This is an **info** callout box to highlight some information to the user.
</Callout>

<Callout title="Warning Callout" type="warning">
This is a **warning** callout box. Be careful about missing this!
</Callout>

### YouTube Embed

<YouTube id="dQw4w9WgXcQ" />

### FAQ Component

<FAQ>
  <FAQItem question="What is this page?">
    This is a test page containing all available components to see how they look.
  </FAQItem>
  <FAQItem question="Why are we testing components?">
    To ensure that the styling for each component looks good and consistent before actually writing real content using them.
  </FAQItem>
</FAQ>
